mapper.sql: id, category_id, name, icon, total_questions, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.category_id, s.name, s.icon, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_question q WHERE q.subject_id = s.id AND q.status = 1), 0) AS total_questions, s.sort_order, s.status, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM exam_subject s WHERE s.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC

SELECT s.id, s.category_id, s.name, s.icon, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_question q WHERE q.subject_id = s.id AND q.status = 1), 0) AS total_questions, s.sort_order, s.status, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM exam_subject s ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_subject (category_id, name, icon, total_questions, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{icon}, #{totalQuestions}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_subject SET total_questions = COALESCE(total_questions, 0) + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{subjectId}
UPDATE exam_subject SET total_questions = GREATEST(COALESCE(total_questions, 0) - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{subjectId}
